title: First Containment
content: The team enters a small shrine inner room where anchor patterns appear. A low-difficulty Shrine Guardian prowls the inner chamber guarding carvings and relics.

choices.text: Examine the inner-carving on the shrine wall
Inspect the Hunters' Circle after-action report
Look through the archived gala photo

choices.notes: M01 is an easy predator with a guaranteed S05 drop; S05 mirrors to Chronicle when picked up (protected).

meta.notes: Teaches anchor containment concept and ritual+tech synergy (small tutorial encounter).
